Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestSpecializationClone

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestSpecializationClone
Direct Known Subclasses:
TestSpecializationClone.EmptySpecialization, TestSpecializationClone.NonEmptySpecialization
public abstract class TestSpecializationClone extends AbstractTests
Unit tests about specialization cloning. These tests ensure that a clone is indeed disconnected from the original specialization.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clonePutIdentDifferentType()
    Ensures that adding an identifier substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.
    void
    clonePutIdentSameType()
    Ensures that adding an identifier substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.
    void
    clonePutPred()
    Ensures that adding a predicate substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.
    void
    clonePutType()
    Ensures that adding a type substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.
    void
    cloneSpecializeFormula()
    Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a formula only modify the clone, and not the original specialization.
    void
    cloneSpecializeType()
    Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a type only modify the clone, and not the original specialization.
    void
    cloneSpecializeTypenv()
    Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a type environment only modify the clone, and not the original specialization.

  • Method Details

    • clonePutType

      public void clonePutType()
      Ensures that adding a type substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.

    • clonePutIdentSameType

      public void clonePutIdentSameType()
      Ensures that adding an identifier substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.

    • clonePutIdentDifferentType

      public void clonePutIdentDifferentType()
      Ensures that adding an identifier substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.

    • clonePutPred

      public void clonePutPred()
      Ensures that adding a predicate substitution to a clone does not change the original specialization.

    • cloneSpecializeType

      public void cloneSpecializeType()
      Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a type only modify the clone, and not the original specialization. This corresponds to bug 757.

    • cloneSpecializeTypenv

      public void cloneSpecializeTypenv()
      Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a type environment only modify the clone, and not the original specialization.

    • cloneSpecializeFormula

      public void cloneSpecializeFormula()
      Ensures that the side-effects performed while specializing a formula only modify the clone, and not the original specialization.
